Package dontlookback

Class LookBasedMonster

java.lang.Object
dontlookback.BasicMonster
dontlookback.LookBasedMonster
All Implemented Interfaces:
Enemy, Monster, NPC
public class LookBasedMonster extends BasicMonster
Look-Based Monster Implementation Implements the core "Don't Look Back" mechanic where monsters: - Only become active when looked at by the player - Chase the player when seen - Despawn after 5 seconds of not being observed - Can regenerate in different locations This is the central monster type that drives the unique horror experience.
Version:
1.0
Author:
DLB Team

  • Method Details

    • updateLookBasedBehavior

      public void updateLookBasedBehavior(float[] playerPos, boolean isObserved, double deltaTime)
      Update monster behavior based on observation status
      Parameters:
      playerPos - Current player position [x, y, z]
      isObserved - Whether player is currently looking at this monster
      deltaTime - Time since last update in seconds

Don't Look Back - Horror Survival Game Engine

Built with Java 17, LWJGL 3.3.4, JBox2D | GitHub Repository | Report Issues
